title: Lily's Garden Friends
synopsis: Lily discovers that making friends in the garden is as easy as sharing, caring, and exploring nature together with her new butterfly and bunny companions.

pages.text: Lily loved playing in her backyard garden. The flowers were bright yellow, red, and purple. The grass was soft and green under her bare feet.

illustration.description: A young girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes stands in a colorful garden with bright yellow, red, and purple flowers, soft green grass, using bright sunny playground illustration style with primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Lily standing in a beautiful garden with colorful flowers

pages.text: One sunny morning, a beautiful orange butterfly landed on Lily's nose. 'Hello!' said the butterfly. 'I'm Bella. Want to be friends?'

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes has a bright orange butterfly perched on her nose, both smiling happily in a sunny garden setting with joyful energetic colors and white space
illustration.alt: Lily with Bella the butterfly on her nose

pages.text: 'Yes!' giggled Lily. 'I would love a butterfly friend!' Bella fluttered around Lily's head, making her laugh and spin in circles.

illustration.description: A joyful girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes spinning in circles while an orange butterfly flies around her head in a bright sunny garden with primary colors and inclusive, energetic playground style
illustration.alt: Lily spinning with Bella flying around her

pages.text: While Lily and Bella played, a small brown bunny hopped out from behind a big sunflower. He looked shy and a little sad.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes and an orange butterfly watch as a small brown bunny peeks shyly from behind a tall sunflower in a bright garden with primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Shy bunny hiding behind a sunflower while Lily and Bella watch

pages.text: 'Hi there, little bunny!' called Lily. 'Do you want to play with us?' The bunny's ears perked up. 'I'm Benny,' he said softly. 'But I don't know how to fly like Bella.'

illustration.description: A kind girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes kneeling down to talk to a small brown bunny while an orange butterfly hovers nearby, all in a sunny garden with joyful energetic colors and friendship activities theme
illustration.alt: Lily talking to Benny the bunny with Bella nearby

pages.text: 'That's okay!' said Lily. 'Friends don't have to be the same. You can hop, and that's special too!' Benny smiled and did a happy little hop.

illustration.description: A smiling girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes clapping as a brown bunny hops joyfully while an orange butterfly dances in the air, all in a bright sunny garden with primary colors and inclusive playground style
illustration.alt: Lily clapping as Benny hops happily with Bella flying

pages.text: The three friends played hide-and-seek among the flower beds. Bella hid on flower petals, Benny hid behind leaves, and Lily hid behind trees.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes peeking from behind a tree while an orange butterfly sits on flower petals and a brown bunny hides behind large leaves in a colorful garden with bright sunny playground colors and white space
illustration.alt: All three friends playing hide-and-seek in the garden

pages.text: They shared a picnic lunch under the apple tree. Lily brought sandwiches, Bella found sweet nectar, and Benny shared his favorite clover.

illustration.description: A happy girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sitting under an apple tree with sandwiches, while an orange butterfly sips nectar and a brown bunny munches clover, all sharing a picnic with joyful energetic friendship activities and primary colors
illustration.alt: Three friends sharing a picnic under an apple tree

pages.text: As the sun set, the friends hugged goodbye. 'See you tomorrow!' said Lily. 'Friends forever!' chirped Bella and Benny together. Lily smiled, happy to have such wonderful garden friends.

illustration.description: A content girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes waving goodbye as an orange butterfly and brown bunny wave back in a garden at sunset with warm primary colors, white space, and inclusive friendship theme
illustration.alt: Lily waving goodbye to her garden friends at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: What color is Bella the butterfly?
questions.explanation: Bella is a beautiful orange butterfly who became Lily's first garden friend.

questions.question: What is the bunny's name?
questions.explanation: The shy bunny's name is Benny, and he can hop very well.

questions.question: Where do the friends have their picnic?
questions.explanation: The three friends shared their picnic lunch under the apple tree in the garden.

questions.question: What does Lily learn about friendship?
choices: friends don't have to be the same
questions.explanation: Lily learns that friends don't have to be the same - they can all have different special abilities.
